Resource Profile: Patient

Official URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/Patient Version: 1.0.0
Active as of 2024-07-26 Computable Name: Patient

Copyright/Legal: Varian Medical Systems, Inc.

This profile represents Patient Demographics, Contacts and other administrative information. Profile Contains: Demographics, Contacts, Region specific details like Race, Ethnicity and Language (if applicable), User Defined Labels

Usage:

  • Refer to this Resource Profile: Appointment, Audit Event, BodyStructure, Condition-Diagnosis (CancerCondition)... Show 8 more, CarePlan, ChargeItem, A reference to a document, Observation-StageCategory, Observation-StageGroup, Task, Observation-Vital-Signs and Observation-Vital-Signs-Component
  • Examples for this Resource Profile: Patient/Patient-256, Patient/Patient-352 and Patient/RadiotherapyPatientSHS-216

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Differential Table
  • Key Elements Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Statistics/References
  • All

This structure is derived from Patient

Patient Patient
id 1..1idLogical id of this artifact
meta
versionId S0..1idVersion specific identifier
lastUpdated S0..1instantWhen the resource version last changed
implicitRules 0..0
language 0..0
Slices for extension 0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
patient-mothersmaidenName 0..1stringMother's Maiden name
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-mothersMaidenName
value[x] 1..1stringValue of extension
Max Length: 64
uSCoreRace 0..*(Complex)Patient's Race(s)
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-race
extension 1..*ExtensionExtension
extension:ombCategory 0..0
extension:detailed 0..0
isPrimary 0..1booleanWhether the ethnicity or race is primary?
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/isPrimary
uSCoreEthnicity 0..*(Complex)Patient's Race(s)
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-ethnicity
extension 1..*ExtensionExtension
extension:ombCategory 0..0
extension:detailed 0..0
extension:text 1..1ExtensionEthnicity Text
isPrimary 0..1booleanWhether the ethnicity or race is primary?
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/isPrimary
PatientCitizenship 0..1(Complex)Nation(s) where the patient claims citizenship
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-citizenship
extension:code 0..1ExtensionExtension
value[x] 1..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: Patient Citizenship Value Set (example)
patientBirthPlace 0..*AddressPlace of Birth for patient
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-birthPlace
patientReligion 0..1CodeableConceptThe patient's professed religious affiliations
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-religion
Binding: ReligiousAffiliation (preferred)
patientStatus 0..1CodeableConceptPatient's status with provider - New Patient | Previous Patient
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-status
patientClass 0..1CodeableConceptPatient's class - In Patient | Out Patient
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-class
patientLocationDetails 0..1(Complex)In Patient Admission details - Admission Period, Room Number
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-locationDetails
patientDeathReason 0..1CodeableConceptList of configured death reasons values are available under valueset 'aria-patient-deathreason'. All database configured values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-deathreason
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-deathReason
value[x] 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: Patient Death Reason (required)
customAttributes 0..*CodeableConceptConfigurable Attributes on Patient. ARIA has Configurable User defined Attributes to accommodate Patient's properties which are not present in ARIA out of box.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/customAttributes
personGender 0..1CodeableConceptPerson's Gender, if is not re-presentable with Administrative Gender Value set.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/person-gender
value[x] 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: Patient Gender (required)
patientGenderIdentity 0..1CodeableConceptThe list of configured gender identity are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-genderidentity'. All values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-genderIdentity
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-genderIdentity
Binding: GenderIdentity (example)
sexOrientation 0..1CodeableConceptAn individual's physical and/or emotional attraction to another individual of the same gender, opposite gender, or both genders.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/sexOrientation
patientOccupation 0..1stringPatient’s occupation details.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-occupation
patientRetirementDetails 0..1(Complex)Patient’s retirement details.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-retirementDetails
patientMobilePhoneProvider 0..1stringPatient's mobile phone provider.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-mobilePhoneProvider
patientPhotoType 0..1CodingPatient's photo type
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-photo-type
testPatient 0..1booleanWhether Patient is test patient. (Supported only on ARIA V18 or onwards) FHIR will return test patient which are created by ARIA. Test Patient Create/update is not supported from FHIR.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-isTestPatient
identifier 1..*IdentifierAn identifier for this patient
use 0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
type 0..1CodeableConceptOnly for ARIA ID1.
system 0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
value 0..1stringThe value that is unique. List of configured Patient Id details are available under valueset 'aria-patient-ids'. All database configured values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-ids
Max Length: 64
period 0..0
assigner 0..0
active 0..1booleanWhether this patient's record is in active use
name 0..*HumanNameA name associated with the patient
id 0..0
use 0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
text 0..0
family 0..1stringFamily name (often called 'Surname')
Max Length: 64
given 0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
Max Length: 64
prefix 0..*stringParts that come before the name
Max Length: 16
suffix 0..*stringParts that come after the name
Max Length: 16

id 0..0
extension 0..0

value 0..1stringThe actual contact point details

rank 0..0
period 0..0
gender 0..1codemale | female | other | unknown
Max Length: 16
birthDate 0..1dateThe date of birth for the individual
Max Length: 23

id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
isPrimary 0..1booleanWhether the patient address is primary?
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/isPrimary
use 0..1codehome | work | temp | old | billing - purpose of this address
type 0..1codepostal | physical | both
text 0..0
line 0..*stringStreet name, number, direction & P.O. Box etc.
city 0..1stringName of city, town etc.
Max Length: 64
district 0..1stringDistrict name (aka county)
state 0..1stringSub-unit of country (abbreviations ok)
Max Length: 64
postalCode 0..1stringPostal code for area
country 0..1stringCountry (e.g. can be ISO 3166 2 or 3 letter code).
Binding: Country (required)
Max Length: 64
period 0..0
maritalStatus 0..1CodeableConceptMarital (civil) status of a patient. This value set includes Marital Status values configured in aria. All values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/marital-status
Binding: Patient Marital Status (required)

language 1..1CodeableConceptThe language which can be used to communicate with the patient about his or her health. The list of configured communication languages are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-language'. modifierExtension ?!0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored
identifier Σ1..*IdentifierAn identifier for this patient
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type Σ0..1CodeableConceptOnly for ARIA ID1.
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

system Σ0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value Σ0..1stringThe value that is unique. List of configured Patient Id details are available under valueset 'aria-patient-ids'. All database configured values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-ids
Example General: 123456
Max Length: 64
active ?!Σ0..1booleanWhether this patient's record is in active use
name Σ0..*HumanNameA name associated with the patient
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
Binding: NameUse (required): The use of a human name.

family Σ0..1stringFamily name (often called 'Surname')
Max Length: 64
given Σ0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
This repeating element order: Given Names appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 64
prefix Σ0..*stringParts that come before the name
This repeating element order: Prefixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 16
suffix Σ0..*stringParts that come after the name
This repeating element order: Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 16
gender Σ0..1codemale | female | other | unknown
Binding: AdministrativeGender (required): The gender of a person used for administrative purposes.


Max Length: 16
birthDate Σ0..1dateThe date of birth for the individual
Max Length: 23
Slices for deceased[x] ?!Σ0..1Indicates if the individual is deceased or not
Slice: Unordered, Open by type:$this
deceasedBooleanboolean
deceasedDateTimedateTime
deceased[x]:deceasedDateTime ?!Σ0..1dateTimeIndicates if the individual is deceased or not
maritalStatus 0..1CodeableConceptMarital (civil) status of a patient. This value set includes Marital Status values configured in aria. The list of configured marital status are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-maritalstatus'. All values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/marital-status
Binding: Patient Marital Status (required)

Patient 0..*PatientInformation about an individual or animal receiving health care services
id Σ1..1idLogical id of this artifact
meta Σ0..1MetaMetadata about the resource
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
versionId SΣ0..1idVersion specific identifier
lastUpdated SΣ0..1instantWhen the resource version last changed
source Σ0..1uriIdentifies where the resource comes from
profile Σ0..*canonical(StructureDefinition)Profiles this resource claims to conform to
security Σ0..*CodingSecurity Labels applied to this resource
Binding: All Security Labels (extensible): Security Labels from the Healthcare Privacy and Security Classification System.


tag Σ0..*CodingTags applied to this resource
Binding: CommonTags (example): Codes that represent various types of tags, commonly workflow-related; e.g. "Needs review by Dr. Jones".


text 0..1NarrativeText summary of the resource, for human interpretation
contained 0..*ResourceContained, inline Resources

URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-status

URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-class
patientLocationDetails 0..1(Complex)In Patient Admission details - Admission Period, Room Number
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-locationDetails

URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-deathReason

Binding: Patient Death Reason (required)

Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
coding Σ0..*CodingCode defined by a terminology system
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
system Σ0..1uriIdentity of the terminology system
version Σ0..1stringVersion of the system - if relevant
code Σ0..1codeSymbol in syntax defined by the system
Max Length: 254
display Σ0..1stringRepresentation defined by the system
Max Length: 254
userSelected Σ0..1booleanIf this coding was chosen directly by the user
text Σ0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
customAttributes 0..*CodeableConceptConfigurable Attributes on Patient. ARIA has Configurable User defined Attributes to accommodate Patient's properties which are not present in ARIA out of box.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/customAttributes
personGender 0..1CodeableConceptPerson's Gender, if is not re-presentable with Administrative Gender Value set.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/person-gender
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/person-gender"
value[x] 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: Patient Gender (required)
patientGenderIdentity 0..1CodeableConceptThe list of configured gender identity are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-genderidentity'. All values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-genderIdentity
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-genderIdentity
Binding: GenderIdentity (example)
sexOrientation 0..1CodeableConceptAn individual's physical and/or emotional attraction to another individual of the same gender, opposite gender, or both genders.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/sexOrientation
patientOccupation 0..1stringPatient’s occupation details.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-occupation
patientRetirementDetails 0..1(Complex)Patient’s retirement details.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-retirementDetails
patientMobilePhoneProvider 0..1stringPatient's mobile phone provider.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-mobilePhoneProvider
patientPhotoType 0..1CodingPatient's photo type
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-photo-type
testPatient 0..1booleanWhether Patient is test patient. (Supported only on ARIA V18 or onwards) FHIR will return test patient which are created by ARIA. Test Patient Create/update is not supported from FHIR.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-isTestPatient
modifierExtension ?!0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored
identifier Σ1..*IdentifierAn identifier for this patient
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type Σ0..1CodeableConceptOnly for ARIA ID1.
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

system Σ0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value Σ0..1stringThe value that is unique. List of configured Patient Id details are available under valueset 'aria-patient-ids'. All database configured values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-ids
Example General: 123456
Max Length: 64
active ?!Σ0..1booleanWhether this patient's record is in active use
name Σ0..*HumanNameA name associated with the patient
extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
Binding: NameUse (required): The use of a human name.

family Σ0..1stringFamily name (often called 'Surname')
Max Length: 64
given Σ0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
This repeating element order: Given Names appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 64
prefix Σ0..*stringParts that come before the name
This repeating element order: Prefixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 16
suffix Σ0..*stringParts that come after the name
This repeating element order: Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 16
telecom Σ0..*ContactPointA contact detail for the individual
extension 0..0
system ΣC0..1codephone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
Binding: ContactPointSystem (required): Telecommunications form for contact point.

value Σ0..1stringThe actual contact point details
Max Length: 64
use ?!Σ0..1codehome | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
Binding: ContactPointUse (required): Use of contact point.

gender Σ0..1codemale | female | other | unknown
Binding: AdministrativeGender (required): The gender of a person used for administrative purposes.


Max Length: 16
birthDate Σ0..1dateThe date of birth for the individual
Max Length: 23
Slices for deceased[x] ?!Σ0..1Indicates if the individual is deceased or not
Slice: Unordered, Open by type:$this
deceasedBooleanboolean
deceasedDateTimedateTime
deceased[x]:deceasedDateTime ?!Σ0..1dateTimeIndicates if the individual is deceased or not
address Σ0..*AddressAn address for the individual
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
isPrimary 0..1booleanWhether the patient address is primary?
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/isPrimary
use ?!Σ0..1codehome | work | temp | old | billing - purpose of this address
Binding: AddressUse (required): The use of an address.


Example General: home
type Σ0..1codepostal | physical | both
Binding: AddressType (required): The type of an address (physical / postal).


Example General: both
line Σ0..*stringStreet name, number, direction & P.O. Box etc.
This repeating element order: The order in which lines should appear in an address label
Example General: 137 Nowhere Street
city Σ0..1stringName of city, town etc.
Example General: Erewhon
Max Length: 64
district Σ0..1stringDistrict name (aka county)
Example General: Madison
state Σ0..1stringSub-unit of country (abbreviations ok)
Max Length: 64
postalCode Σ0..1stringPostal code for area
Example General: 9132
country Σ0..1stringCountry (e.g. can be ISO 3166 2 or 3 letter code).
Binding: Country (required)
Max Length: 64
maritalStatus 0..1CodeableConceptMarital (civil) status of a patient. This value set includes Marital Status values configured in aria. The list of configured marital status are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-maritalstatus'. All values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/marital-status
Binding: Patient Marital Status (required)
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
coding Σ0..*CodingCode defined by a terminology system
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
system Σ0..1uriIdentity of the terminology system
version Σ0..1stringVersion of the system - if relevant
code Σ0..1codeSymbol in syntax defined by the system
Max Length: 32
display Σ0..1stringRepresentation defined by the system
Max Length: 32
userSelected Σ0..1booleanIf this coding was chosen directly by the user
text Σ0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
photo 0..*AttachmentImage of the patient
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
contentType Σ0..1codeMime type of the content, with charset etc.
Binding: Mime Types (required): The mime type of an attachment. Any valid mime type is allowed.


Example General: text/plain; charset=UTF-8, image/png
data 0..1base64BinaryData inline, base64ed
creation Σ0..1dateTimeDate attachment was first created
contact C0..*BackboneElementA contact party (e.g. guardian, partner, friend) for the patient
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension 0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
patientContactSubrelation 0..1stringPatient's relationship with the contact person
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-contact-subrelation
patientContactIsPrimary 0..1booleanWhether the contact is primary
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-contact-isPrimary
patientModeOfArrival 0..1stringPatient Transportation Contant Comment
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-modeOfArrival
relationship 0..*CodeableConceptThe kind of relationship
Binding: PatientContactRelationship (extensible): The nature of the relationship between a patient and a contact person for that patient.


name 0..1HumanNameA name associated with the contact person
extension 0..0
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
Binding: NameUse (required): The use of a human name.

Max Length: 64
given Σ0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
This repeating element order: Given Names appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 64
prefix Σ0..*stringParts that come before the name
This repeating element order: Prefixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 16
suffix Σ0..*stringParts that come after the name
This repeating element order: Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 16
telecom 0..*ContactPointA contact detail for the person
extension 0..0
system ΣC0..1codephone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
Binding: ContactPointSystem (required): Telecommunications form for contact point.

value Σ0..1stringThe actual contact point details
Max Length: 64
use ?!Σ0..1codehome | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
Binding: ContactPointUse (required): Use of contact point.

address 0..1AddressAddress for the contact person

Binding: AddressUse (required): The use of an address.


Example General: home
type Σ0..1codepostal | physical | both
Binding: AddressType (required): The type of an address (physical / postal).


Example General: both
line Σ0..*stringStreet name, number, direction & P.O. Box etc.
This repeating element order: The order in which lines should appear in an address label
Example General: 137 Nowhere Street
city Σ0..1stringName of city, town etc.
Example General: Erewhon
Max Length: 64
district Σ0..1stringDistrict name (aka county)
Example General: Madison
state Σ0..1stringSub-unit of country (abbreviations ok)

postalCode Σ0..1stringPostal code for area
Example General: 9132
country Σ0..1stringCountry (e.g. can be ISO 3166 2 or 3 letter code)

communication 0..*BackboneElementA language which may be used to communicate with the patient about his or her health
language 1..1CodeableConceptThe language which can be used to communicate with the patient about his or her health. The list of configured communication languages are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-language'. All values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/languages
Binding: Patient Language (required)

This structure is derived from Patient

Summary

Mandatory: 2 elements (2 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 2 elements
Prohibited: 44 elements

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-mothersMaidenName

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element Patient.deceased[x] is sliced based on the value of type:$this

Differential View

This structure is derived from Patient

Max Length: 64
given 0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
Max Length: 64
prefix 0..*stringParts that come before the name
Max Length: 16
suffix 0..*stringParts that come after the name
Max Length: 16
period 0..0
telecom 0..*ContactPointA contact detail for the person
id 0..0
extension 0..0
system 0..1codephone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
value 0..1stringThe actual contact point details
Max Length: 64
use 0..1codehome | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
rank 0..0
period 0..0
address
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
addressTelephone1 0..1stringAddress Telephone 1 Number
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/address-telephone1
use 0..1codehome | work | temp | old | billing - purpose of this address
type 0..1codepostal | physical | both
text 0..0
line 0..*stringStreet name, number, direction & P.O. Box etc.
city 0..1stringName of city, town etc.
Max Length: 64
district 0..1stringDistrict name (aka county)
state 0..1stringSub-unit of country (abbreviations ok)
Max Length: 64
postalCode 0..1stringPostal code for area
country 0..1stringCountry (e.g. can be ISO 3166 2 or 3 letter code)
Max Length: 64
period 0..0
gender 0..0
organization 0..0
period 0..0
communication
id 0..0
extension 0..0
modifierExtension 0..0
language 1..1CodeableConceptThe language which can be used to communicate with the patient about his or her health. The list of configured communication languages are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-language'. All values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/languages
Binding: Patient Language (required)
coding
code 0..1codeSymbol in syntax defined by the system
Max Length: 64
display 0..1stringRepresentation defined by the system
Max Length: 64
preferred 0..0
generalPractitioner 0..0
managingOrganization 0..0
link 0..0

Documentation for this format

Terminology Bindings (Differential)

PathConformanceValueSet
Patient.extension:PatientCitizenship.extension:code.value[x]examplePatientCitizenshipVS
Patient.extension:patientDeathReason.value[x]requiredPatientDeathReason (a valid code from http://varian.com/fhir/CodeSystem/patient-deathReason)
Patient.extension:personGender.value[x]requiredPersonGender (a valid code from http://varian.com/fhir/CodeSystem/person-gender)
Patient.address.countryrequiredCountry (a valid code from http://varian.com/fhir/CodeSystem/AriaSystem)
Patient.maritalStatusrequiredPatientMaritalStatus
Patient.communication.languagerequiredPatientLanguage (a valid code from http://varian.com/fhir/CodeSystem/communication-language)

Patient 0..*PatientInformation about an individual or animal receiving health care services
id Σ1..1idLogical id of this artifact
meta Σ0..1MetaMetadata about the resource
versionId SΣ0..1idVersion specific identifier
lastUpdated SΣ0..1instantWhen the resource version last changed

Max Length: 64

URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-race

extension:text S1..1ExtensionEthnicity Text

isPrimary 0..1booleanWhether the ethnicity or race is primary?
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/isPrimary

PatientCitizenship 0..1(Complex)Nation(s) where the patient claims citizenship
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-citizenship
extension:code 0..1ExtensionExtension

value[x] 1..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: Patient Citizenship Value Set (example)
extension:period 0..1ExtensionTime period of citizenship
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"period"
value[x] 1..1PeriodValue of extension
url 1..1uri"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-citizenship"
patientBirthPlace 0..*AddressPlace of Birth for patient
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-birthPlace
patientReligion 0..1CodeableConceptThe patient's professed religious affiliations
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-religion
Binding: ReligiousAffiliation (preferred)
patientStatus 0..1CodeableConceptPatient's status with provider - New Patient | Previous Patient
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-status
patientClass 0..1CodeableConceptPatient's class - In Patient | Out Patient
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-class
patientLocationDetails 0..1(Complex)In Patient Admission details - Admission Period, Room Number
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-locationDetails
patientDeathReason 0..1CodeableConceptList of configured death reasons values are available under valueset 'aria-patient-deathreason'. All database configured values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-deathreason
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-deathReason
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-deathReason"
value[x] 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: Patient Death Reason (required)
customAttributes 0..*CodeableConceptConfigurable Attributes on Patient. ARIA has Configurable User defined Attributes to accommodate Patient's properties which are not present in ARIA out of box.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/customAttributes
personGender 0..1CodeableConceptPerson's Gender, if is not re-presentable with Administrative Gender Value set.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/person-gender
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/person-gender"
value[x] 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: Patient Gender (required)
patientGenderIdentity 0..1CodeableConceptThe list of configured gender identity are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-genderidentity'. All values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-genderIdentity
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-genderIdentity
Binding: GenderIdentity (example)
sexOrientation 0..1CodeableConceptAn individual's physical and/or emotional attraction to another individual of the same gender, opposite gender, or both genders.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/sexOrientation
patientOccupation 0..1stringPatient’s occupation details.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-occupation
patientRetirementDetails 0..1(Complex)Patient’s retirement details.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-retirementDetails
patientMobilePhoneProvider 0..1stringPatient's mobile phone provider.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-mobilePhoneProvider
patientPhotoType 0..1CodingPatient's photo type
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-photo-type
testPatient 0..1booleanWhether Patient is test patient. (Supported only on ARIA V18 or onwards) FHIR will return test patient which are created by ARIA. Test Patient Create/update is not supported from FHIR.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-isTestPatient
modifierExtension ?!0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored
identifier Σ1..*IdentifierAn identifier for this patient
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type Σ0..1CodeableConceptOnly for ARIA ID1.
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

system Σ0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value Σ0..1stringThe value that is unique. List of configured Patient Id details are available under valueset 'aria-patient-ids'. All database configured values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-ids
Example General: 123456
Max Length: 64
active ?!Σ0..1booleanWhether this patient's record is in active use
name Σ0..*HumanNameA name associated with the patient
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
Binding: NameUse (required): The use of a human name.

family Σ0..1stringFamily name (often called 'Surname')
Max Length: 64
given Σ0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
This repeating element order: Given Names appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 64
prefix Σ0..*stringParts that come before the name
This repeating element order: Prefixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 16
suffix Σ0..*stringParts that come after the name
This repeating element order: Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 16
gender Σ0..1codemale | female | other | unknown
Binding: AdministrativeGender (required): The gender of a person used for administrative purposes.


Max Length: 16
birthDate Σ0..1dateThe date of birth for the individual
Max Length: 23
Slices for deceased[x] ?!Σ0..1Indicates if the individual is deceased or not
Slice: Unordered, Open by type:$this
deceasedBooleanboolean
deceasedDateTimedateTime
deceased[x]:deceasedDateTime ?!Σ0..1dateTimeIndicates if the individual is deceased or not
maritalStatus 0..1CodeableConceptMarital (civil) status of a patient. This value set includes Marital Status values configured in aria. The list of configured marital status are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-maritalstatus'. All values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/marital-status
Binding: Patient Marital Status (required)

Patient.genderrequiredAdministrativeGender

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Patient 0..*PatientInformation about an individual or animal receiving health care services
id Σ1..1idLogical id of this artifact
meta Σ0..1MetaMetadata about the resource
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
versionId SΣ0..1idVersion specific identifier
lastUpdated SΣ0..1instantWhen the resource version last changed
source Σ0..1uriIdentifies where the resource comes from
profile Σ0..*canonical(StructureDefinition)Profiles this resource claims to conform to
security Σ0..*CodingSecurity Labels applied to this resource
Binding: All Security Labels (extensible): Security Labels from the Healthcare Privacy and Security Classification System.


tag Σ0..*CodingTags applied to this resource
Binding: CommonTags (example): Codes that represent various types of tags, commonly workflow-related; e.g. "Needs review by Dr. Jones".


text 0..1NarrativeText summary of the resource, for human interpretation
contained 0..*ResourceContained, inline Resources

use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type Σ0..1CodeableConceptOnly for ARIA ID1.
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

system Σ0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value Σ0..1stringThe value that is unique. List of configured Patient Id details are available under valueset 'aria-patient-ids'. All database configured values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-ids
Example General: 123456

use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
Binding: NameUse (required): The use of a human name.

Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
isPrimary 0..1booleanWhether the patient address is primary?
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/isPrimary
use ?!Σ0..1codehome | work | temp | old | billing - purpose of this address
Binding: AddressUse (required): The use of an address.


Example General: home
type Σ0..1codepostal | physical | both
Binding: AddressType (required): The type of an address (physical / postal).


Example General: both
line Σ0..*stringStreet name, number, direction & P.O. Box etc.
This repeating element order: The order in which lines should appear in an address label
Example General: 137 Nowhere Street
city Σ0..1stringName of city, town etc.
Example General: Erewhon
Max Length: 64
district Σ0..1stringDistrict name (aka county)
Example General: Madison
state Σ0..1stringSub-unit of country (abbreviations ok)
Max Length: 64
postalCode Σ0..1stringPostal code for area
Example General: 9132
country Σ0..1stringCountry (e.g. can be ISO 3166 2 or 3 letter code).
Binding: Country (required)
Max Length: 64
maritalStatus 0..1CodeableConceptMarital (civil) status of a patient. This value set includes Marital Status values configured in aria. The list of configured marital status are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-maritalstatus'. All values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/marital-status
Binding: Patient Marital Status (required)

extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
contentType Σ0..1codeMime type of the content, with charset etc.
Binding: Mime Types (required): The mime type of an attachment. Any valid mime type is allowed.


Example General: text/plain; charset=UTF-8, image/png
data 0..1base64BinaryData inline, base64ed
creation Σ0..1dateTimeDate attachment was first created
contact C0..*BackboneElementA contact party (e.g. guardian, partner, friend) for the patient
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension 0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
patientContactSubrelation 0..1stringPatient's relationship with the contact person
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-contact-subrelation
patientContactIsPrimary 0..1booleanWhether the contact is primary
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-contact-isPrimary
patientModeOfArrival 0..1stringPatient Transportation Contant Comment
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/patient-modeOfArrival
relationship 0..*CodeableConceptThe kind of relationship
Binding: PatientContactRelationship (extensible): The nature of the relationship between a patient and a contact person for that patient.


name 0..1HumanNameA name associated with the contact person
extension 0..0
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
Binding: NameUse (required): The use of a human name.

family Σ0..1stringFamily name (often called 'Surname')
Max Length: 64
given Σ0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
This repeating element order: Given Names appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 64
prefix Σ0..*stringParts that come before the name
This repeating element order: Prefixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 16
suffix Σ0..*stringParts that come after the name
This repeating element order: Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
Max Length: 16
telecom 0..*ContactPointA contact detail for the person
extension 0..0
system ΣC0..1codephone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
Binding: ContactPointSystem (required): Telecommunications form for contact point.

value Σ0..1stringThe actual contact point details
Max Length: 64
use ?!Σ0..1codehome | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
Binding: ContactPointUse (required): Use of contact point.

address 0..1AddressAddress for the contact person
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
addressTelephone1 0..1stringAddress Telephone 1 Number
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/address-telephone1
use ?!Σ0..1codehome | work | temp | old | billing - purpose of this address
Binding: AddressUse (required): The use of an address.


Example General: home
type Σ0..1codepostal | physical | both
Binding: AddressType (required): The type of an address (physical / postal).


Example General: both
line Σ0..*stringStreet name, number, direction & P.O. Box etc.
This repeating element order: The order in which lines should appear in an address label
Example General: 137 Nowhere Street
city Σ0..1stringName of city, town etc.
Example General: Erewhon
Max Length: 64
district Σ0..1stringDistrict name (aka county)
Example General: Madison
state Σ0..1stringSub-unit of country (abbreviations ok)
Max Length: 64
postalCode Σ0..1stringPostal code for area
Example General: 9132
country Σ0..1stringCountry (e.g. can be ISO 3166 2 or 3 letter code)
Max Length: 64
communication 0..*BackboneElementA language which may be used to communicate with the patient about his or her health
language 1..1CodeableConceptThe language which can be used to communicate with the patient about his or her health. The list of configured communication languages are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-language'. All values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/languages
Binding: Patient Language (required)
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
coding Σ0..*CodingCode defined by a terminology system
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
system Σ0..1uriIdentity of the terminology system
version Σ0..1stringVersion of the system - if relevant
code Σ0..1codeSymbol in syntax defined by the system
Max Length: 64
display Σ0..1stringRepresentation defined by the system
Max Length: 64
userSelected Σ0..1booleanIf this coding was chosen directly by the user
text Σ0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept

This structure is derived from Patient

Summary

Mandatory: 2 elements (2 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 2 elements
Prohibited: 44 elements

  • The element Patient.deceased[x] is sliced based on the value of type:$this
